basic_details.job_title: Indian Army TES 56 Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 10+2 Technical Entry Scheme
basic_details.short_information: Indian Army has officially announced the 10+2 Technical Entry Scheme (TES-56) Recruitment 2026, offering a prestigious opportunity for candidates to join as commissioned officers. This recruitment is ideal for 12th-pass students aiming to build a career in the Indian Army without appearing for a written exam. The online application process will begin from 13 May 2026 and will remain open until 12 June 2026 on the official website. Candidates must have appeared in JEE (Mains) 2026 along with meeting the required academic criteria.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 13-05-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 12-06-2026

how_to_apply: Follow these simple steps to apply online:
Visit the official Indian Army website
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 is an officer entry scheme for 10+2 candidates. It allows eligible students to join the Indian Army as commissioned officers through the Technical Entry Scheme course scheduled to commence in January 2027

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TES-56 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The exact number of vacancies has not been mentioned in the short notification. Candidates are advised to check the detailed official notification on the Indian Army website for complete vacancy information and distribution details

faq.question: Q3. What is the application date for TES-56 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process for Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 will begin on 13 May 2026 and continue until 12 June 2026. Candidates must apply within this period through the official recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for TES-56 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 12th with at least 60% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM). Additionally, appearing in JEE (Mains) 2026 is mandatory to be eligible for the TES-56 course.

faq.question: Q5. Is JEE Mains compulsory for TES-56 Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, JEE (Mains) 2026 is compulsory for TES-56 Recruitment. Candidates must meet both criteria: qualifying JEE Mains and securing a minimum of 60% marks in PCM subjects in Class 12th.
